input: Can I pause my course for two weeks?

input.query: pause course two weeks pause policy

payload.name: search_course_policy
payload.output:
[DOC_PAUSE] Course Pause Policy: Learners can pause their course once for up to 14 calendar days. The pause request must be approved by the academic coordinator.

[DOC_REFUND] Refund Policy: Students are eligible for a 100% refund if they cancel at least 7 calendar days before the cohort start date. Students are eligible for a 50% refund within the first 3 calendar days after the cohort starts. No refund is available after the third calendar day.

[DOC_PROJECTS] Project Submission Policy: All pr

input.query: pause course two weeks pause policy

retrievals.query: pause course two weeks pause policy

documents.title: Course Pause Policy
documents.text: Learners can pause their course once for up to 14 calendar days. The pause request must be approved by the academic coordinator.

documents.title: Refund Policy
documents.text: Students are eligible for a 100% refund if they cancel at least 7 calendar days before the cohort start date. Students are eligible for a 50% refund within the first 3 calendar days after the cohort starts. No refund is available after the third calendar day.

documents.title: Project Submission Policy
documents.text: All projects must be submitted through the learning portal. Submissions through email or chat are not considered official.

final_response: Yes. You can pause your course once for up to 14 calendar days, but the request must be approved by the academic coordinator. [DOC_PAUSE]
